philosophy.subtitle: The Fifth Element
philosophy.desc1: In ancient philosophy, Aether was considered the fifth element—the absolute medium that fills the universe and transmits light. Just as modern science posits invisible energy to explain the order and gravity of the cosmos, Aether is the essential medium that connects all things and transmits energy.
philosophy.desc2: Aethemar originates from this grand concept. We are not just an agency; we aim to be the 'most powerful invisible medium' that helps your brand's unique light and potential reach everywhere. Through AI technology, the modern Aether, we create limitless connections and growth.
philosophy.desc3: A name born by adding the strategic edge of Marketing to the infinite expandability of Aether: Aethemar. Just as light traverses the universe, we design an unparalleled path for your brand to shine brilliantly at the center of the world using the most innovative technologies and sharp insights.

ceo.name: Lee Heekyung
ceo.desc: Bridging the analytical rigor of artificial intelligence with the creative intuition of high-end marketing. With a distinguished career as an in-house marketing director for leading hospitals and premier law firms, Lee Heekyung brings unparalleled expertise in navigating complex, trust-based industries.
ceo.mastery_desc: Strategic growth for medical and legal sectors.
ceo.media_desc: Recognized authority with multiple broadcast appearances.
